description.value:
Beginning at 1st Level, you learn the hidden stance of the Demon Hunters, based around hitting all the vital points of the target, making multiple attacks when others could make one. You can use Dexterity instead of Strength while in this stance, for the attack and damage rolls of your Simple Melee weapons and Nanaya Clan Hijutsu attack rolls and Save DC's calculations.

Starting at 3rd level, Your attack with such a flurry that dodging a blade is like dodging many. You gain a +1d4 bonus to weapon attack rolls made at disadvantage. This becomes 1d6 at 15th level.

At 7th level, you become able to use the clan's hidden technique to deliver docens of strikes at once. Weapon attacks with simple weapons and Nanaya Clan Hijutsu ignore half of the target's damage reduction. In addition, when you cast a Nanaya clan Hijutsu that makes an attack roll, for each 4 your attack roll result beats the target's AC, increase your weapon's damage by 1 die (maximum +3). This becomes for each 3 at 11th level and for each 2 at 15th level.

Finally at 18th level, your flurry of slashes is so intence no defense can withstand it. Weapon attacks with simple weapons and Nanaya Clan Hijutsu you cast ignore the target's damage reduction.
